samples.text: A computer can run a program while connected to power. Is this logically consistent?
A computer is able to execute a program while plugged in. Does this make logical sense?
A machine can run software while connected to electricity. Is this logically consistent?
Running a program and being powered are compatible states. So a computer can do both. Is the described situation logically consistent?
A computer can run a program while connected to power. The room temperature is 22 degrees Celsius. Is this logically consistent?
